title: extract_response is pub but not re-exported; its public status is unexplained
description: extract_response is declared pub in client.rs and is called as crate::client::extract_response from methods.rs. It is visible to external crate users but is not intended as a public API surface — it is a plumbing function needed only because methods.rs is a sibling module, not a child. There is no doc comment explaining this. A contributor would not know whether to use it, extend it, or whether it is safe to use externally. Either add a doc comment explaining it is pub(crate) intentionally and why, or change visibility to pub(crate) to make the intent explicit.
